args:
set -eu
measure_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure prefill-path --out "$measure_dir" >/dev/null
python3 - "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
obj = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
assert obj['scoped_cold']['executed_artifact_count'] > obj['scoped_warm']['executed_artifact_count']
assert obj['scoped_warm']['reused_artifact_count'] >= obj['scoped_cold']['reused_artifact_count']
assert obj['warm_vs_cold']['executed_artifact_reduction_bps'] == 10000
PY
printf 'explore-cache-reuse-vs-rebuild\n'
